name: mysql-tab
description: interface de alto nivel para mysql

scripts.test: docker-compose up -d && node -e "setTimeout(()=>process.exit(0), 10000)" && node --test ./test/index.js && (node -e "setTimeout(()=>process.exit(0), 1000)" & docker-compose down) || docker-compose down
